description: Malaria-endemic setting — IPTp-SP protocol test. G2P1, 24 years, 22 weeks GA, Contact 2 in holoendemic P. falciparum area (Siaya County, Kenya). First IPTp-SP dose due, mild anemia (Hb 10.2), ITN reinforcement needed.
notes: The skill produced a comprehensive, protocol-compliant note with all 8 expectations met. Key differentiators: (1) DOT administration explicitly specified per SKILL.md Section 5a, (2) exact per-tablet dose (sulfadoxine 500mg/pyrimethamine 25mg) stated as required by SKILL.md, (3) >=1 month spacing and Contact 3 scheduling explicitly documented. The without_skill note correctly identified the malaria-endemic setting, recommended IPTp-SP, recognized mild anemia, and continued standard iron — but lacked DOT specification, precise dosing, and the explicit spacing rule.
